title: Device Home screen - Connection status
scenario: Verify that the Device Home Screen correctly displays 'Connected' with a green marker when HS is paired and connected, and changes to 'Disconnected' with a red marker when HS is turned off.
steps: Ensure the device (HS) is paired and connected to the Home Screen (HS).
Observe the connection status display on the Device Home Screen.
Observe the connection status display again on the Device Home Screen.
expected: When HS is paired and connected, status shows 'Connected' with a green marker. When HS is turned off, status changes to 'Disconnected' with a red marker.
